info.title: MedRisk AI
info.description:
Educational/research backend foundation for a future oncology AI platform.

**This software is an educational and research portfolio project. It is not a medical device and must not be used for diagnosis, treatment decisions, or emergency medical guidance.**

get.description:
Confirms the API process itself is alive. Deliberately does not touch the database
or the model runtime.

Readiness requires PostgreSQL, and additionally the histopathology model when
`MODEL_REQUIRED=true`. Returns 503 (via `ServiceUnavailableError`) when not ready.

Public, non-sensitive model runtime status - never the bundle path or other
internal administration details.

Public, non-sensitive build/release info only - no environment dump, dependency list,
filesystem path, or database host. See VersionResponse's docstring for the "never
fabricated, only omitted" rule applied to git_commit/model_version.

post.summary: Log in and receive a token pair

get.summary: Get one of the current user's predictions by id
Metadata for the currently active histopathology model
Fetch a research sample's image bytes

post.summary: Run research inference on a known dataset sample
Re-validate a study's stored configuration against the current schema

get.summary: Get the most recent dataset quality audit

post.summary: Run a new dataset quality audit (administrator only)

get.summary: Get the most recent dataset leakage audit

post.summary: Run a new dataset leakage audit (administrator only)
Create a pending evaluation run (administrator only)

get.summary: Get one evaluation run's confusion matrix
List per-sample predictions for one evaluation run (error analysis)

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.default: This software is an educational and research portfolio project. It is not a medical device and must not be used for diagnosis, treatment decisions, or emergency medical guidance.

AuditStatus.title: AuditStatus
AuditStatus.description: Outcome of a dataset quality or leakage audit.

file.title: File
file.description: A PNG or JPEG histopathology patch.

client_reference.title: Client Reference
client_reference.description: Optional non-sensitive client-side reference. Must not contain patient-identifying information.

ConfusionMatrixRead.title: ConfusionMatrixRead
ConfusionMatrixRead.description:
`available=False` (with `reason` set) when the run has no completed metrics yet, or
its task type isn't one this phase derives a confusion matrix for - the master spec
requires unavailable analysis to be reported explicitly, never hidden or fabricated.

image_url.title: Image Url
image_url.description: Relative URL to GET the sample image; built by the endpoint, not a DB column.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.default: This software is an educational and research portfolio project. It is not a medical device and must not be used for diagnosis, treatment decisions, or emergency medical guidance.

research_disclaimer.title: Research Disclaimer
research_disclaimer.default: This software is an educational and research portfolio project. It is not a medical device and must not be used for diagnosis, treatment decisions, or emergency medical guidance.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.default: This software is an educational and research portfolio project. It is not a medical device and must not be used for diagnosis, treatment decisions, or emergency medical guidance.

PredictionNotAvailableResponse.title: PredictionNotAvailableResponse
PredictionNotAvailableResponse.description: Honest 501 payload returned while no real model is loaded (survival module only).

PredictionRequest.title: PredictionRequest
PredictionRequest.description: Placeholder input for the (still-unimplemented) survival module.

ResultClassification.title: ResultClassification
ResultClassification.description:
How an evaluation run's numbers may be interpreted - never inferred from context,
always set explicitly when the run is created.

RunStatus.title: RunStatus
RunStatus.description:
Lifecycle of an experiment run or evaluation run. A run's metrics/predictions must
only ever be trusted when status == COMPLETED - PENDING/RUNNING rows have no results
yet, and FAILED/CANCELLED/INVALIDATED rows must never be presented as complete.

ScientificMaturity.title: ScientificMaturity
ScientificMaturity.description:
Where a model sits on the path from "proves the pipeline runs" to "a real research
candidate" - distinct from `ResultClassification`, which describes one evaluation run
rather than the model as a whole.

StudyRead.title: StudyRead
StudyRead.description: API-facing view of a persisted `ResearchStudy` row.

StudyValidationResult.title: StudyValidationResult
StudyValidationResult.description:
Result of re-validating a study's stored configuration against the current
`StudyConfig` schema - never mutates the stored row.

expires_in.title: Expires In
expires_in.description: Seconds until the access token expires.

VersionResponse.title: VersionResponse
VersionResponse.description:
Safe release metadata only - never a filesystem path, dependency list, or DB host.

`git_commit`/`model_version`/`model_synthetic_only` are `None` (not fabricated) whenever
the underlying source isn't available - see app.api.v1.endpoints.health.version.
